active_skills.purpose: Intake, source review, requirements, gap analysis, and scope.
Flow, UX, wireframe, and design-ready acceptance criteria.
Delivery planning, handoff, task source of truth, and engineering sequencing.
Build completion evidence, code review, and ready-for-QA checks.
QA, verification, release readiness, rollback, and close-out.
RAID, decisions, traceability, risk, and policy checks.
Branch, diff, sensitive file, commit, push, tag, and release safety.

legacy_archive.note: Legacy PMO skills are preserved for reference and must not be loaded by default.
